hyperedges.label: Electron 3-Layer Architecture
hyperedges.detail: main/ (Node.js) → preload/ (contextBridge) → renderer/ (React). IPC boundaries strictly enforced.

hyperedges.label: IPC Channel Flow
hyperedges.detail: IPC constants in src/shared/ipc.ts, preload whitelist in src/preload/index.ts, renderer wrappers in src/renderer/ipc.ts, main handlers in src/main/ipc.ts

hyperedges.label: Adapter Registry Pattern
hyperedges.detail: All backend adapters registered in src/main/adapters/manager.ts registry array; AdapterManager.get() for lookup

hyperedges.label: Security Middleware Pattern
hyperedges.detail: Async generator wrapping adapter.send() output; scans streaming chunks for injection patterns; emits SecurityEvents

hyperedges.label: CSS-First Animation
hyperedges.detail: Keyframes in tailwind.config.ts, consumed as utility classes, no animation library; GPU properties only

hyperedges.label: Sequential SQLite Migrations
hyperedges.detail: Numbered SQL files in src/main/store/migrations/, run in order by initDb()

hyperedges.label: Test Colocation
hyperedges.detail: Tests co-located: src/main/foo.ts → src/main/foo.test.ts; renderer tests in __tests__/ subdirectory

hyperedges.label: TDD for Security Fixes
hyperedges.detail: Write failing test → confirm fail → implement → confirm pass; used across all security tasks

hyperedges.label: Empty State Pattern
hyperedges.detail: Centered message with heading, description, CTA button; no SaaS-style icon-in-box

hyperedges.label: Wizard Flow Pattern
hyperedges.detail: Step 1 probe → Step 2 install → Step 3 auth check; Back navigation resets state; progress via step counter

hyperedges.label: Two-Step Delete Confirmation
hyperedges.detail: First click changes label to 'Confirm?'; second click executes; per-item state management

hyperedges.label: Toolbar Three-Zone Layout
hyperedges.detail: Zone 1: Mode + Backend selector | Zone 2: Sidebar tools (Search, Cron, MCP, Plugins) | Zone 3: Right panels (Personas, Pipelines, Settings)

hyperedges.label: Dangerous Env Key Blocklist
hyperedges.detail: PATH, LD_PRELOAD, LD_LIBRARY_PATH, DYLD_INSERT_LIBRARIES, DYLD_LIBRARY_PATH, NODE_OPTIONS, NODE_PATH blocked from MCP/plugin spawns

nodes.label: Serve the query, not the interface
nodes.norm_label: serve the query, not the interface

nodes.label: Task 8: Main Process IPC Handlers + Electron Entry
nodes.norm_label: task 8: main process ipc handlers + electron entry

nodes.label: Security Task 1: Add Content Security Policy
nodes.norm_label: security task 1: add content security policy

nodes.label: Security Task 3: Persona Validation + Message Length
nodes.norm_label: security task 3: persona validation + message length

nodes.norm_label: p0 task 2: settings panel + wizard re-entry

properties.goal: Close quality gaps: auth tracking, wizard UX, empty states, window state, auto-updater, tests
Ship 8 pre-built persona templates with variable placeholders
Create GitHub repo, TestAdapter, Playwright E2E, restore install test
Fix animation regressions, add streaming dots, button morph, micro-entrances
Add in-process cron scheduler with SQLite persistence
Fix typography, button system, icon library, viewport, accessibility, contrast, prose
Replace basic search with full-featured FTS5 session search
Add MCP client capabilities with server lifecycle and tool execution
Build plugin system with lifecycle hooks via stdio subprocess
Remediate Critical/High security audit findings
Add prompt injection detection, path traversal protection, write approval
Close 3 remaining open items: xlsx upgrade, dead props, E2E verification
Address 7 priority UI critique findings
Fix 4 animation review issues: welcome screen, dialog gating, GPU transitions, landing hover
Add 5 HTTP API backends with encrypted key storage
Fix 9 regression/fresh-install bugs
Close 10 remaining security gaps from deep audit
Fix 10 confirmed UI bugs across layout, components, and state
Fix P0/P1 responsive issues: fluid widths, wrapping toolbar, touch input
Fix 5 bugs from live Playwright audit of first-run flow
Fix 6 bugs from commit audit
Fix all P0/P1 accessibility violations

properties.purpose: Echo adapter for E2E testing, registered when E2E_TEST=1
Abstract base class for HTTP API adapters with SSE streaming
Encrypted API key storage via Electron safeStorage
SQLite persistence for cron jobs and logs
Path traversal detection and safe path resolution
MCP server lifecycle management and tool execution
FTS5-enhanced search with scoped queries and snippets
Async generator wrapper scanning streaming output for threat patterns
Traps Tab/Shift+Tab within a container ref
Shows IPC error banner at top of app

properties.rule: Animate only transform and opacity; never width, height, margin, padding, top, left; never transition-all

properties.hoverGate: hoverable: variant with @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine)

properties.rule: Validation at IPC boundary before forwarding to service layer
Write failing test first, run to confirm fail, then implement; used across security and audit fixes
Never pass shell strings to child_process.spawn; always array argv

properties.purpose: Stores wizard_done, window_state, theme, proxy, api keys

properties.location: SQLite settings table with key: prefix

properties.fix: Command must resolve inside plugin directory
Add patterns for 'forget your rules' phrases
